timeline.label: Universal valuation contract backfill: calculation proofs attached to all four additive components
FY2024 Form 990 filed (ProPublica); revenue ~$42.9M, net assets ~$161.9M

industry.structure: Local cemetery and memorial services with high land and zoning barriers; few public comps.
industry.share_shift: Stable local franchise; competition from other Long Island cemeteries and cremation trend.
industry.trend: Cremation mix rising industry-wide; land-constrained cemeteries retain pricing power on remaining inventory.
